item.title: RT @myinvestpilot: 还可以把策引文档库地址发给 ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini / Grok 等 AI，与它们讨论，这样能更容易解决你的问题 https://t....
item.author: @madawei2699

item.title: RT @tunguz: Sir another one of your problems has fallen to AI. https://t.co/PXAMJ9M2St
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: RT @tunguz: Why are you, a grown man, still investing in software stocks?
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: RT @tunguz: I just ordered my new @nvidia merch. https://t.co/mxpouGrOzk
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: RT @myinvestpilot: 📢策引近期更新： - 投资心法系列新增多篇文章，欢迎阅读 - 组合方面，A 股新增动量和跨资产组合，还有 A 股 4 号和美股 4 号（新策略） - 文档库的策略...
item.description:
RT @myinvestpilot: 📢策引近期更新： - 投资心法系列新增多篇文章，欢迎阅读 - 组合方面，A 股新增动量和跨资产组合，还有 A 股 4 号和美股 4 号（新策略） - 文档库的策略实验室新增 8 篇文章，覆盖近三十个策略实验，也是最近几个组合和策略的来源
--- @madawei2699 | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @madawei2699

item.title: “AI: it feels most impressive when you don’t know much about the subject, don’t care or don’t have a...

item.title:

They g...
item.description:
“Loves tearing down overhyped AI claims, but his critiques always hit the nail on the head”.
They get it, in China.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 1435
